text: Your support agent was amazingly patient, but that doesn't change the fact that your last update wiped our entire transaction history and cost us $14k.
I love how the new dashboard takes 45 seconds to load every time I click a tab. Truly a revolutionary patient-testing experience for our workflow.
Can someone clarify if 'unlimited data' in your enterprise tier includes a 5GB secret throttling cap, or if I should just update my billing expectations now?
Is there a direct mailing address or email where our team can send a physical gift basket to the developers who fixed the API latency issue?
I appreciate the detailed explanation of why my refund request was rejected under section 4B of the terms.
Thanks for confirming our cancellation. We really enjoyed the 3-year run, but we've migrated our workspace over to CompetitorX today.
Shoutout to the infrastructure team for taking the main database server down right during peak Monday business hours!
I was wondering if the system is designed to automatically overwrite unsaved draft forms when logging in from a second device?
Is there any upper limit on how many seats we can add to a single workspace, because our team is doubling next month?
Great job on the new checkout flow! Adding three extra confirmation screens makes buying our products so much more adventurous.
